hero_subtitle: SFTY connects provider checks, case management, and evidence preservation into one operational dashboard to help compliance teams track audit readiness efficiently.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness weakens across scattered records
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain a clear audit trail when evidence, logs and case history remain fragmented across multiple systems. This slows review processes and makes it harder to defend compliance decisions during audits or regulatory inspections.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider outputs, decision logs, reviewer actions and evidence packages into one traceable workflow so compliance teams can maintain a consistent and audit-ready case history.
workflow_title: From provider checks to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY applies internal rules to provider checks while routing reviews, creating cases, recording decisions and preserving evidence for operational audit readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows, preserving evidence and decision history to help VASPs maintain clear audit readiness across compliance operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with controlled workflows, preserved evidence and governed deployment to support scalable audit readiness and bank due diligence from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow

authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a compliance control layer that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions, evidence and reports for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY automate compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal rules to provider data, routes reviews, creates cases, records decisions, and prepares reports to reduce manual work and support consistent compliance processes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, and evidence packages to provide audit-ready records that support regulatory inspections and internal compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects to existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, consolidating their outputs into a connected compliance operating layer without replacing them.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but sits above them, structuring their outputs into workflows, evidence and reporting for clearer and auditable compliance management.
final_title: Review audit readiness across compliance workflows
final_description: Explore how SFTY organizes evidence, case history, decision logs and provider outputs into one operational dashboard.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
